history.emptyState.empty: No transfers found for your account
limit.deposit.description: Transfers beyond the Hydration circuit breaker deposit limit will be temporarily locked.
limit.withdraw.description: Transfers beyond the Hydration circuit breaker withdrawal limit will be temporarily locked.
limit.wormhole.description: Transfers bridged from {{ chainName }} are subject to Wormhole Governor capacity limits and per-transfer limits. Transfers over the limit are queued until capacity is available.
limit.alert.wormhole.bigTransaction: This transfer exceeds the Wormhole per-transfer limit on {{ chainName }}. It will be queued by the governor and released after a delay.
limit.alert.wormhole.exceeded: This transfer exceeds remaining Wormhole limit on {{ chainName }}. It will be queued by the governor and released after a delay.
limit.alert.deposit.exceeded: This transfer exceeds the Hydration circuit breaker threshold. {{ remaining, currency }} will be deposited immediately. {{ locked, currency }} will remain temporarily locked until {{ datetime, date(format: 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm') }} or until the circuit breaker is lifted.
limit.alert.deposit.locked: This transfer exceeds the Hydration circuit breaker threshold. {{ locked, currency }} will remain temporarily locked until {{ datetime, date(format: 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm') }} or until the lockdown is lifted.
limit.alert.window.reset: You can try again in ~{{ value, interval(format: 'short'; largest: 1) }} to transfer without lockup period.
limit.alert.window.lockdown: Lockdown lifts in ~{{ value, interval(format: 'short'; largest: 1) }}.
limit.alert.acceptLockupPeriod: I accept the lockup period for my transfer.
limit.alert.withdraw.exceeded: This transfer exceeds the Hydration circuit breaker withdrawal limit. Funds will be temporarily locked until {{ datetime, date(format: 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm') }} or until the lockdown is lifted.
limit.alert.withdraw.locked: Withdrawals are currently disabled by the Hydration circuit breaker.
limit.tooltip.window.lockdown: Lockdown lifts in ~{{ value, interval(format: 'short'; largest: 1) }}.
